idea: Baseline 7-kernel fused MoE pipeline from tutorial (00_baseline.co)
Fuse scatter into WGMMA, count+build, quant+sort+gather to reduce 7 kernels to 4
Apply all tutorial optimizations: parallel.async, grid swap, L2 persistence, QSG pipelining, Hillis-Steele scan, CUDA Graphs. DMA falls back to scalar copies (alignment issue).
Replace opt_copy (scalar 32-bit loads) with cp.async tiled_copy using SM80_CP_ASYNC_CACHEALWAYS<uint128_t> for LHS DMA. 128-bit coalesced loads via cp.async pipeline eliminate 60% L1TEX stalls.
